SELECT num, (num >> 2) AS shift_right FROM test_shift;
SELECT (num >> (SELECT MAX(num) FROM test_shift WHERE num < 100)) FROM test_shift;
SELECT t1.num, t2.num, (t1.num >> t2.num) AS bitwise_shift FROM (SELECT num FROM test_shift) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT num FROM test_shift) AS t2 ON t1.num > t2.num;
SELECT sp.param, (8 >> sp.param) AS shifted_value FROM shift_params sp;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (id INT, value INT);
SELECT cd.id, (cd.value >> 2) AS shifted_value FROM complex_data cd WHERE cd.value < 64;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM complex_data) >> 1 AS max_shifted;
SELECT (num >> 33) AS high_shift FROM test_shift WHERE num <= 1;
